qa_pair.question: Which game does this MCP integrate with?
Which engine does the in-game bridge target?
Which tool reads nearby tile passability and map events?
Which tool reads scene, party, message, menu and battle state?
Which tool batches keyboard actions and frame waits?
Does the input API directly modify gold, inventory or story variables?
What bridge protocol identifier is used?
Where are per-process bridge files stored relative to the prepared game copy?
Which transport does the MCP server use?
Does background keyboard recovery move the game window to the foreground?
